text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Maruzensky and I go to the cafeteria
together.

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Staff
text_block_list.text:
Be sure to try our new Glitter Shortcake! It's
chock-full of silver sprinkles!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ooh, look, Trainer! That cake is so fab! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ooh, look, Trainer! That cake is so fab! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It looks like a disco ball, doesn't it? Even the
cakes are trendy here!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Nngh... Must... resist... Pull back... the throttle...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh... Urrrgh... I have to be the last one, the
very last...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Maya! What's the matter? You're all
moaning and groaning.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, heya, Maruzen! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Agh, I screwed up!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ahem. Maruzen. Hehe... It's so nice to see you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Your mood really seems to be all over the
place.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You wouldn't happen to be working on becoming
a "mature woman" again, would you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's right! That's exactly it! Right now, I'm
practicing how to wait!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: How to wait... for what?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Glitter cake! I'm waiting until there's only one left!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wanna eat that cake so bad... but mature women
wait!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so you're letting other people get theirs first.
That's certainly very mature of you...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But isn't standing around gawking at something
you want to eat a little silly?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I think you could use some adulting advice from a
proper adult! ♪
choice_data_list: You're the right person for the job, Maruzensky.
You're the right person for the job, Maruzensky.
Adults have a duty to lead the way.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I think you could use some adulting advice from a
proper adult! ♪
choice_data_list: You're the right person for the job, Maruzensky.
You're the right person for the job, Maruzensky.
Adults have a duty to lead the way.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh-ho! ☆ I appreciate the nomination! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me, going after what you want without
thinking about it is the way to go!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Really? Even as an adult? You don't wait for
others to get theirs first?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Of course it'd be unbecoming of an adult to take
everything for themselves...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But when something you like is in front of you,
even adults can get a little excited!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wow! If someone super duper mega mature like
you says so, it has to be true!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Um, what exactly do you mean by "super duper
mega mature"?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, time to pull out of this holding
pattern! ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And off she goes... Once she's set on something,
she follows through in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Is that the power of youth? If so, I'm not about to
lose!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wait up, Maya! I want some cake too! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Maruzensky and Mayano Top Gun enjoy
their cakes together.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wow! Really?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Of course! It's an adult's responsibility to forge a
path for the young to follow! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh! That totally makes sense!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, you're always rushing
ahead!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I do have a certain get-up-and-go attitude, don't
I? ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And then at the end, you run out of gas and just
stall out! ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Urk!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I think I get it now! ☆ Thanks, you two! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: G-go on and eat up...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...I thought I was hiding my exhaustion pretty
well, but she really has a keen eye.
choice_data_list: That initial burst of speed is really important!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, exactly! Good point...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky looks a little upset, but having the
cake that Mayano Top Gun brings back lifts her
spirits right back up.
